title: (Bullish Signal) PII, price moved above its 50-day Moving Average on Nov 16, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could indicate a change in the trend, and may be a buy signal for investors. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor found 45 similar cases, and 38 were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 84%. Current price $95.08 crossed the resistance line at $95.19 and is trading between $95.19 resistance and $95.06 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 10/15/20 - 11/16/20, the price experienced a -0.84% Downtrend, while the week of 11/09/20 - 11/16/20 shows a +8% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/zx11x8kentz51.png?width=1519&format=png&auto=webp&s=d0b7ddd7db1fca57f749b9e4859c7b700bf6b6e9

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 13, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on PII as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 58 of 78 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for PII just turned positive on November 16, 2020. Looking at past instances where PII's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 31 of 41 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 76%.

PII moved above its 50-day Moving Average on November 16, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for PII crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 13, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 14 of 18 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 78%.

Following a +6.09% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where PII advanced for three days, in 240 of 321 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 75%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 161 of 221 cases where PII Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 73%.
